summary: Completed iteration 6 testing for AnimaVM UI refactor. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Sidebar shows 'Anima VM' as first nav item (nav-animavm), old nav items (Provision Agent, OpenClaw VM) correctly removed. AnimaVM page loads with provision stepper (data-testid='anima-vm-page', 'provision-stepper'), all 6 steps have correct testids (step-sandbox, step-terminal, step-openclaw, step-claudecode, step-skills, step-deploy), stepper toggle works (collapse/expand), only step 1 Run button enabled, status bar shows tool pills (Sandbox, Terminal, OpenClaw, Claude Code, Engine), all 6 monitor tabs work (tab-live, tab-console, tab-logs, tab-browsing, tab-sandboxes, tab-message), Message tab has nudge-input and send-nudge-btn with full functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: AnimaVM.js correctly implements unified page with provision stepper + VM monitoring
Sidebar.js correctly updated: 'animavm' is first nav item with Rocket icon
App.js correctly routes 'animavm' to AnimaVM component
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Stepper toggle (collapse/expand) works correctly via stepperOpen state
Run button states correctly controlled: only sandbox enabled when no sandbox exists
Status bar shows 5 tool status pills: Sandbox, Terminal, OpenClaw, Claude Code, Engine
6 monitor tabs implemented: Live Feed, VM Console, Agent Logs, Browsing, VMs, Message
Message tab has input field with placeholder and send button with proper disabled state
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for these endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 verified AnimaVM UI refactor: Single 'Anima VM' page replaces separate Provision Agent and OpenClaw VM pages. Sidebar nav items: nav-animavm (1st), nav-mind, nav-fundhq, nav-agents, nav-infra, nav-skills, nav-deals, nav-portfolio, nav-financials, nav-activity, nav-memory, nav-config, nav-wallet (13 total). Old nav items (nav-provision, nav-openclaw, etc.) correctly removed. AnimaVM page has collapsing stepper with 6 steps and 6 monitor tabs. All backend APIs working: /api/provision/status, /api/provision/phase-state, /api/openclaw/status, /api/openclaw/actions, /api/openclaw/sandboxes, /api/openclaw/browsing, /api/openclaw/sandbox-exec-log, /api/provision/nudge, /api/provision/nudge/custom.

backend_apis_tested: GET /api/provision/status - 200 OK with sandbox, tools, nudges
GET /api/provision/phase-state - 200 OK (returns error when no sandbox)
GET /api/openclaw/status - 200 OK with openclaw, sandbox_summary, has_activity
GET /api/openclaw/actions - 200 OK with actions list and categories
POST /api/provision/nudge - 200 OK, adds default autonomy nudge
POST /api/provision/nudge/custom - 200 OK, adds custom message to nudges
